requirements.task_name: Identify the most recent Kubernetes CI/CD DevOps project and record its title
requirements.task_description: Find the latest DevOps project that uses both Kubernetes and a CI/CD tool, and save its exact title into the evaluation notes field.

requirements.task_name: Prepare a contact message referencing two microservices projects using Go or Node.js
requirements.task_description: Find two microservices-related projects where the primary backend language is either Go or Node.js, then send a contact message that mentions both project titles and a preferred interview date.

requirements.task_name: Shortlist exactly three AWS-related skills with proficiency 4 or higher in DevOps/Cloud categories
requirements.task_description: Locate AWS skills within DevOps/Cloud categories with proficiency ≥4 and add exactly three to the shortlist.

requirements.task_name: Create a reading list with one short and one long recent DevOps blog post
requirements.task_description: From the blog, select two DevOps-tagged posts published in or after 2023: one short (≤7 min) and one long (≥12 min), and add both to the reading list.

requirements.task_name: Record the earliest start year of any DevOps or SRE role in the experience timeline
requirements.task_description: Find the earliest start year among DevOps/SRE roles and record that year in the recruiter evaluation field.

requirements.task_name: Compare two most recent production Terraform-on-AWS projects
requirements.task_description: Find projects that use Terraform on AWS in production, then add the two most recently started such projects to the comparison view.

requirements.task_name: Generate a tailored resume view for a Senior DevOps role focused on CI/CD and Observability in Germany
requirements.task_description: Use the tailored resume builder to generate and view a resume targeting 'Senior DevOps Engineer' in Germany, last 4 years only, focusing on CI/CD and Observability.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the newsletter with topics based on available Kubernetes and Monitoring articles
requirements.task_description: Confirm that there are Kubernetes and Monitoring posts, then subscribe with a work email, weekly frequency, and DevOps + Cloud topics.
